title: pinus nigra subsp. calabrica
intro: Pinus nigra subsp. calabrica, also known as Calabrian Black Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to the Calabria region in southern Italy. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with its resin and essential oil showing antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The Calabrian Black Pine has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Pinus nigra subsp. calabrica include essential oil, resin, and extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
